name: EVTDLY_c
description: Event Delay - delays an input event by a specified time period
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock interfaceFunctionName="EVTDLY_c" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="evtdly4" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="EVTDLY_c">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="2" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0.1"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" width="60.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
criticalRules: Cannot delay multiple events simultaneously (single buffer)
